title: Disposable Bath Towel Compressed Thickened Soft Cotton Travel Hotel Portable Individual Pack
detail_text: 【Product Highlights 】 ✅ 100% Thickened Cotton – Extra soft & absorbent, feels like a regular towel ✅ Individually Wrapped – Hygienic & portable, one pack per use ✅ Large Size 70×140cm – Full body coverage, perfect for showering ✅ Lightweight & Compact – Easy to carry, saves luggage space ✅ Multipurpose Use – Travel, hotel, gym, swimming, camping, beauty salon 【Product Description 】 Your Hygienic Travel Companion Tired of using hotel towels that you're not sure are clean? Our disposable bath towel is the perfect solution for your travel and daily hygiene needs. Made from high-quality thickened cotton material, our disposable towel is ultra-soft, highly absorbent, and gentle on your skin. Each towel is individually sealed in a sterile package, ensuring maximum hygiene and convenience. The compact and lightweight design makes it easy to pack in your luggage, gym bag, or handbag. detail_html:
【Product Highlights 】

✅ 100% Thickened Cotton – Extra soft & absorbent, feels like a regular towel

✅ Individually Wrapped – Hygienic & portable, one pack per use

✅ Large Size 70×140cm – Full body coverage, perfect for showering

✅ Lightweight & Compact – Easy to carry, saves luggage space

✅ Multipurpose Use – Travel, hotel, gym, swimming, camping, beauty salon

【Product Description 】

Your Hygienic Travel Companion

Tired of using hotel towels that you're not sure are clean? Our disposable bath towel is the perfect solution for your travel and daily hygiene needs.

Made from high-quality thickened cotton material, our disposable towel is ultra-soft, highly absorbent, and gentle on your skin. Each towel is individually sealed in a sterile package, ensuring maximum hygiene and convenience.

The compact and lightweight design makes it easy to pack in your luggage, gym bag, or handbag. Whether you're traveling for business or leisure, hitting the gym, or visiting the swimming pool, this disposable towel has got you covered.

【Why Choose Disposable Towels? 】

Traditional Towels

Our Disposable Towels

Heavy & bulky, takes up luggage space

Compact & lightweight, saves space

Needs washing after each use

Use once and throw away, hassle-free

Hotel towels may not be properly cleaned

Individually sealed, 100% hygienic

Takes long to dry, can develop odor

No drying needed, always fresh & clean

Risk of cross-contamination

Single use, zero bacteria transmission

【Perfect For 】

✈️ Travel & Business Trips – No more worrying about hotel towel hygiene

Hotel & Resort Stay – Your personal hygienic towel anywhere you go

️ Gym & Fitness – Fresh towel for every workout

Swimming & Beach – Quick dry body after swim

️ Camping & Outdoor – Lightweight and easy to carry

Beauty Salon & Spa – Hygienic single-use for customers

Baby Care – Gentle and clean for sensitive baby skin

【Specifications 】

Item

Details

Product Name

Disposable Bath Towel

Material

Thickened Cotton / Non-woven Fabric

Size

70cm × 140cm

Packaging

Individual Vacuum Pack

Color

White

Weight

~40g per piece

Quantity

Select from variation

【How to Use 】

1️⃣ Tear open the individual package

2️⃣ Unfold and expand the towel

3️⃣ Use as you would a regular bath towel

4️⃣ Dispose after use (single use only)

【Warm Tips 】

⚠️ For single use only, do not reuse

⚠️ Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight

⚠️ Keep out of reach of children to avoid suffocation risk

⚠️ If you have sensitive skin, please test before full use

⚠️ Product color may slightly vary due to lighting and screen settings

product.desc:
Imported Free



Produced in China, these pants are not imported, ensuring quality and affordability for customers worldwide.






Bulk Pack



Comes in a pack of 5, these pants offer value for money and are perfect for those on the go or in need of frequent replacements.






Pure Cotton Material



Crafted from pure cotton, these disposable underwear offer comfort and breathability, perfect for daily wear or travel.






Disposable Design



Designed for single-use, these pants provide convenience and hygiene, ideal for travelers, hotels, and medical settings.






Versatile Use



From beauty treatments to saunas, these pants can be used in various settings, making them a versatile addition to any routine.

title: Thickened Compressed Disposable Towel Set Disposable Bath Face Hand Towel Portable for Travel Hotel Sports Business Trip
detail_text: Product Introduction Our premium compressed disposable towels are made of thickened pure cotton material, soft, skin-friendly and highly absorbent. Each towel is individually vacuum packed, lightweight and ultra-portable after compression, greatly saving your luggage space. After soaking in water, it expands quickly into a large thick towel, perfect for face washing, body bathing, hand wiping. Disposable design avoids cross-infection, ideal for travel, hotel stays, gym workouts, sports, spa and outdoor trips. Key Features Thickened Cotton Fabric: Larger size & thicker texture, strong water absorption, not easy to tear or shed fibers Compressed Portable Design: Small round tablet shape after compression, easy to carry in pockets, handbags and backpacks Independent Single Pack: Each towel sealed separately, clean and hygienic, convenient for single-time use Mild Skin-Friendly Material: No irritating chemical ingredients, safe for sensitive skin, adults and kids can use Multi-Scenario Application: Suitable for travel, hotel, gym, camping, beach, business trip, daily makeup removal How To Use Take out the compressed towel tablet from the independent package Pour a small amount of water to fully soak the tablet The towel will expand instantly within seconds, unfold it to use Dispose after single use, no need to wash Applicable Scenarios Travel, Business Trip, Hotel, Homestay, Gym, Sports, Camping, Beach, Spa, Outdoor Activities, Daily Face Care Product Specification Material: Thickened Pure CottonSingle Pack: 1 Towel Per BagDisposable, Individually Wrapped
detail_html:
Product Introduction

Our premium compressed disposable towels are made of thickened pure cotton material, soft, skin-friendly and highly absorbent. Each towel is individually vacuum packed, lightweight and ultra-portable after compression, greatly saving your luggage space. After soaking in water, it expands quickly into a large thick towel, perfect for face washing, body bathing, hand wiping. Disposable design avoids cross-infection, ideal for travel, hotel stays, gym workouts, sports, spa and outdoor trips.

Key Features

Thickened Cotton Fabric: Larger size & thicker texture, strong water absorption, not easy to tear or shed fibers

Compressed Portable Design: Small round tablet shape after compression, easy to carry in pockets, handbags and backpacks

Independent Single Pack: Each towel sealed separately, clean and hygienic, convenient for single-time use

Mild Skin-Friendly Material: No irritating chemical ingredients, safe for sensitive skin, adults and kids can use

Multi-Scenario Application: Suitable for travel, hotel, gym, camping, beach, business trip, daily makeup removal

How To Use

Take out the compressed towel tablet from the independent package

Pour a small amount of water to fully soak the tablet

The towel will expand instantly within seconds, unfold it to use

Dispose after single use, no need to wash

Applicable Scenarios

Travel, Business Trip, Hotel, Homestay, Gym, Sports, Camping, Beach, Spa, Outdoor Activities, Daily Face Care

Product Specification

Material: Thickened Pure CottonSingle Pack: 1 Towel Per BagDisposable, Individually Wrapped

page_json.name: Thickened Compressed Disposable Towel Set Disposable Bath Face Hand Towel Portable for Travel Hotel Sports Business Trip
page_json.description: Product IntroductionOur premium compressed disposable towels are made of thickened pure cotton material, soft, skin-friendly and highly absorbent. Each towel is individually vacuum packed, lightweight and ultra-portable after compression, greatly saving your luggage space. After soaking in water, it expands quickly into a large thick towel, perfect for face washing, body bathing, hand wiping. Disposable design avoids cross-infection, ideal for travel, hotel stays, gym workouts, sports, spa and outdoor trips.Key FeaturesThickened Cotton Fabric: Larger size & thicker texture, strong water absorption, not easy to tear or shed fibersCompressed Portable Design: Small round tablet shape after compression, easy to carry in pockets, handbags and backpacksIndependent Single Pack: Each towel sealed separately, clean and hygienic, convenient for single-time useMild Skin-Friendly Material: No irritating chemical ingredients, safe for sensitive skin, adults and kids can useMulti-Scenario Application: Suitable for travel, hotel, gym, camping, beach, business trip, daily makeup removalHow To UseTake out the compressed towel tablet from the independent packagePour a small amount of water to fully soak the tabletThe towel will expand instantly within seconds, unfold it to useDispose after single use, no need to washApplicable ScenariosTravel, Business Trip, Hotel, Homestay, Gym, Sports, Camping, Beach, Spa, Outdoor Activities, Daily Face CareProduct SpecificationMaterial: Thickened Pure CottonSingle Pack: 1 Towel Per BagDisposable, Individually Wrapped

title: Disposable Bath Towel Thickened Compressed Towel Portable Travel Towel Beauty Hotel Disposable Bath towel
detail_text: [High quality] 100% cotton fiber. Our disposable bath towels and facial towels are made of cotton fiber to ensure cleanliness while maintaining soft skin. Super absorbent, soft and durable, ready to use at any time! [Safety] No odor, odor, added chemicals, or fluorescent brighteners. Say goodbye to reusable towels in public places to avoid cross infection. Give you different levels of cleanliness, a soft touch, and easy to carry! [Strong water absorption] Our disposable bath towels have a strong water absorption property of pearl texture, are flexible and not easy to tear, have no flocculation, and experience comfort and comfort; Can be used twice, and can be used as a rag to wipe the table after cleaning. [Separate packaging] Lightweight and sterile packaging. It's convenient to carry when traveling, gym, or camping, and it's easy to put in your luggage. It is dustproof. [Wide range of uses] Our disposable bath towels can be used in hotels/motels/accommodation, business travel, hiking and camping, face/body/hair cleaning and drying, travel and vacations, salons and spas, nurseries, elderly care, guest socks, pet bath towels, and many other uses. product.desc:
💖WELCOME TO BADIGAO💖

本店是官方旗舰店原装正品，保证品质 ！

拒绝 高仿 / 一比一 / 低质量商品 ！

This shop is the original authentic of the official store. We ensure high quality product with anti-counterfeiting code.

We highly reject high imitation / low quality goods!


💖SERVICE

‼️If you are not sure what size to take, you can ask us for suggestion

‼️如果您不确定要拿什么尺码，可以询问我们的建议


‼️If you have any dissatisfaction after receiving the goods, please contact us in time to deal with it for you

‼️如果您收到货后有任何不满意，请及时联系我们为您处理


💖𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗗𝗨𝗖𝗧 𝗜𝗡𝗙𝗢𝗥𝗠𝗔𝗧𝗜𝗢𝗡

▶Disposable Bra 一次性内衣

▶Material：97% polyamide +3% spandex

▶Packing: Each one is individually packaged 免洗 拆开即穿

▶Use: For travel, hospital nursing, menstrual period, pregnancy, business trip, Rainy season.

▶Color：White, Green, Pink


💖𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗗𝗨𝗖𝗧 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦

▶Strong support：Running also doesn't slide 强支撑，跑步也不会滑动

▶Strong focus：Won't be embarrassed 超聚拢，不漏点

▶Individually packaged：Wash free directly wear 免洗直穿，独立包装

▶Friendly design：Elastic Chest Support，30 Coaster，Elastic Straps弹力胸托，立体杯罩，弹力肩带



💖SIZE SUGGESTION

S： chest size below 24 inch；weight below 45kg

M： chest size 25 - 27 inch；weight 45kg - 55kg

L： chest size 28 - 30 inch；weight 55kg - 65kg

XL： chest size 31 - 32 inch；weight 65kg - 75kg

2XL：chest size 33 - 34 inch；weight 75kg - 85kg


💖APPLICATION SCENARIO

1. don't want to wash during business trip.

2. Too lazy to wash bra during the travel.

3. Bra is not easy to dry on rainy days

4. Hospital escort. Doesn't want to wash bra.


#Bra disposable plus size #Disposable bra #Disposable bra and panties #Travel bra #一次性内衣

detail_html:
• Deodorant Function : The deodorant feature helps to keep your feet smelling fresh, making them ideal for business travel or daily wear.






• Sweat Absorbing : These socks are designed to absorb sweat, keeping your feet dry and reducing the risk of odor buildup.






• Disposable Design : These socks offer a convenient disposable design, perfect for travelers or those who prefer not to wash their socks daily.






• Made in China : Produced in China, these socks adhere to high-quality standards, ensuring durability and reliability.






• Summer Thin Cotton : Crafted from thin cotton, these socks provide breathability and comfort during the summer months, keeping your feet cool and dry.

detail_blocks.text: • Deodorant Function : The deodorant feature helps to keep your feet smelling fresh, making them ideal for business travel or daily wear. • Sweat Absorbing : These socks are designed to absorb sweat, keeping your feet dry and reducing the risk of odor buildup. • Disposable Design : These socks offer a convenient disposable design, perfect for travelers or those who prefer not to wash their socks daily. • Made in China : Produced in China, these socks adhere to high-quality standards, ensuring durability and reliability. • Summer Thin Cotton : Crafted from thin cotton, these socks provide breathability and comfort during the summer months, keeping your feet cool and dry.

They feature sweat-absorbing properties to keep feet dry and reduce odor buildup.
The deodorant function helps maintain freshness, ideal for business trips, travel, or daily use.
Designed for convenience, these socks require no washing and can be discarded after use.
Produced in China with quality standards, they provide a hygienic and practical solution for busy lifestyles.

title: 100/50/25PCS Compressed Towel Disposable Coin Face Towel Portable Makeup Cleaning Cloth Outdoor Travel Barbecue Camping Hotel
detail_text: Welcome to our store，Wishing you a pleasant shopping experience Type: Disposable compressed towel Material: non-woven fabric Packaging includes: 20/50/100pcs Usage: Add water and expand into a soft, absorbent towel, perfect for facial cleansing and beauty. - Made of high-quality fabric, it is gentle on the skin and has strong water absorption. They are also naturally degradable, ensuring a friendly choice for your daily skincare. -Suitable for children and adults, free of chemicals or detergents, safe to use. -The compact and portable design is perfect for outdoor enthusiasts and anyone seeking convenient cleaning solutions. -Whether it's hiking, camping, picnicking, or just engaging in daily activities, our face masks are suitable for any situation. -Used for facial cleaning, kitchen cleaning, furniture cleaning, etc. Note 1.Due to manual measurement, please allow an error of 1-3mm. 2. Different monitors may have different colors, please understand.

Compact and portable, they are perfect for outdoor activities such as camping, hiking, and picnics, as well as household cleaning tasks.
Versatile and easy to carry, these towels provide practical cleanliness anytime, anywhere.

title: Unisex Disposable Socks Moisture-proof Odor-preventing
detail_text: Disposable Design These socks offer a convenient disposable design, perfect for travelers who prefer not to carry laundry on their adventures. Unisex Style Featuring a unisex style, these socks are suitable for both men and women, making them a versatile addition to any travel wardrobe. Odor-Resistant Material Crafted from pure cotton, these socks are designed to prevent odor, keeping your feet fresh and comfortable throughout the day. Compact Size With their compact size, these socks are easy to pack and carry, making them an essential item for any traveler. Daily Throwaway As daily throwaway socks, they are ideal for those who value ease and convenience, ensuring you always have a clean pair at hand.
detail_html:
Disposable Design

These socks offer a convenient disposable design, perfect for travelers who prefer not to carry laundry on their adventures.

Unisex Style

Featuring a unisex style, these socks are suitable for both men and women, making them a versatile addition to any travel wardrobe.

Odor-Resistant Material

Crafted from pure cotton, these socks are designed to prevent odor, keeping your feet fresh and comfortable throughout the day.

Compact Size

With their compact size, these socks are easy to pack and carry, making them an essential item for any traveler.

Daily Throwaway

As daily throwaway socks, they are ideal for those who value ease and convenience, ensuring you always have a clean pair at hand.

aiTexts: These unisex disposable socks are designed for both men and women, offering versatile use for travel and outdoor activities.
Made from breathable, soft cotton with odor-resistant and antibacterial properties, they keep feet fresh and comfortable.
The socks feature a mid-calf length and a seamless toe design, providing support and preventing deformation.
Innovative 3D wrap and 7-shaped heel enhance stability and walking comfort.
Ideal for travelers or anyone needing convenient, hygienic foot coverage during camping, hiking, or daily use.
aiDescription.aiTip: AI-generated content for reference purposes only.

product.desc:
Disposable Design

These socks offer a convenient disposable design, perfect for travelers who prefer not to carry laundry on their adventures.

Unisex Style

Featuring a unisex style, these socks are suitable for both men and women, making them a versatile addition to any travel wardrobe.

Odor-Resistant Material

Crafted from pure cotton, these socks are designed to prevent odor, keeping your feet fresh and comfortable throughout the day.

Compact Size

With their compact size, these socks are easy to pack and carry, making them an essential item for any traveler.

Daily Throwaway

As daily throwaway socks, they are ideal for those who value ease and convenience, ensuring you always have a clean pair at hand.

Type: Disposable Compressed Bath Towel

Material: Cotton

Size: 70*100cm (After soaking in water)

Color: White

Uses: Suitable for business trips, travel, portable use

🌟 Features

✅Great for your travel or outdoor activities like hiking, biking and camping

✅Made of quality material, soft, skin-friendly and comfortable

✅Compact in size, convenient to carry

✅Can be put in jacket pocket, purse or cosmetic bag

✅Can be used repeatedly

✔️ How to Use:

1. Remove towel from packaging.

2. Soak the towel in water for 3 seconds.

3. Unfold and wring out excessive water.

4. Towel is ready to be used.

⚠️Notes

1. Please allowed 1-3mm differences due to manual measurement, thanks.

2.Due to the difference between different monitors, the picture may not reflect the actual color of the item.

Disposable Design

Designed for single-use, ensuring hygiene and convenience for every wash.

Pure Cotton Material

Hanging Style

title: [SG Stocks][2 Sizes] Disposable Thickened Premium Towel for Travels / Sports / Camping *Eco Friendly*
detail_text: The disposable towel is a convenient and hygienic solution for on-the-go cleanliness. Compact and individually wrapped, it's perfect for travel, camping, or anytime you need a quick and disposable drying option. Made from absorbent microfibre materials, this disposable towel ensures practicality without compromising hygiene, making it a must-have for your personal care routine. Important : • The energy used in the whole life cycle [of a single use towel] is less than the energy used by your washing machine to clean one single piece of towel – in fact it is only 10% of that energy and water combined • They bio-degrade in 6 weeks and degrade completely within 8 days in a typical sewage farm Variations : • 30cm x 70cm • 70cm x 140cm Notes : • Do note there may be slight deviation in terms of product dimensions / measurements • Due to lighting and colour / resolution variations on device displays, slight visual differences may be observed in the packaging and actual item
detail_html:
The disposable towel is a convenient and hygienic solution for on-the-go cleanliness. Compact and individually wrapped, it's perfect for travel, camping, or anytime you need a quick and disposable drying option. 

 

Made from absorbent microfibre materials, this disposable towel ensures practicality without compromising hygiene, making it a must-have for your personal care routine.

 

Important :

•          The energy used in the whole life cycle [of a single use towel] is less than the energy used by your washing machine to clean one single piece of towel – in fact it is only 10% of that energy and water combined

•          They bio-degrade in 6 weeks and degrade completely within 8 days in a typical sewage farm

 

Variations :

•          30cm x 70cm

•          70cm x 140cm

 

 

Notes :

•          Do note there  may be slight deviation in terms of product dimensions / measurements

•          Due to lighting and colour / resolution variations on device displays, slight visual differences may be observed in the packaging and actual item

title: Mop Wipes Disposable wipes Floor cleaning wipes disposable mop wipes Wet wipes Dry wipes Anti Bacteria Anti Bacteria Sg stock lazy mop
detail_text: Floor Cleaning Wipes – Dry & Wet Make cleaning effortless with our versatile floor cleaning wipes, designed for both dry and wet cleaning tasks. Perfect for maintaining spotless surfaces in your home or office. Key Features: Two-in-One Cleaning: Dry Wipes (28cm x 21cm): Effectively absorb hair and dust using electrostatic adsorption. (30 sheets/pkt) Wet Wipes (30cm x 20cm): Remove stubborn oil stains and grime with ease. (20 sheets/pkt) Multifunctional Use: Suitable for a variety of surfaces, including kitchen countertops, ceramic tiles, marble, wooden floors, vinyl floors, ceilings, and furniture. Double-Sided Reusability: Use both sides of the wipe; simply flip it over when one side is dirty. Convenient Usage: Attach the wipes to a mop for floor cleaning or use them by hand for wiping furniture and other surfaces. No Washing Needed: Simply dispose of the wipe after use, saving time and effort. High Absorption Capability: Electrostatic friction effectively captures dust, hair, and other particles. Time-Saving & Hygienic: Eliminate the hassle of washing; just use and throw away. Ready Stock in Singapore!!
detail_html:
Floor Cleaning Wipes – Dry & Wet

Make cleaning effortless with our versatile floor cleaning wipes, designed for both dry and wet cleaning tasks. Perfect for maintaining spotless surfaces in your home or office.

Key Features:

Two-in-One Cleaning:

Dry Wipes (28cm x 21cm): Effectively absorb hair and dust using electrostatic adsorption. (30 sheets/pkt)

Wet Wipes (30cm x 20cm): Remove stubborn oil stains and grime with ease. (20 sheets/pkt)

Multifunctional Use: Suitable for a variety of surfaces, including kitchen countertops, ceramic tiles, marble, wooden floors, vinyl floors, ceilings, and furniture.

Double-Sided Reusability: Use both sides of the wipe; simply flip it over when one side is dirty.

Convenient Usage: Attach the wipes to a mop for floor cleaning or use them by hand for wiping furniture and other surfaces.

No Washing Needed: Simply dispose of the wipe after use, saving time and effort.

High Absorption Capability: Electrostatic friction effectively captures dust, hair, and other particles.

Time-Saving & Hygienic: Eliminate the hassle of washing; just use and throw away.

Ready Stock in Singapore!!
